compiled_state.title: test-design-approve.sh DA-APPROVE-4: extra tags in fixture but no preservation assertions -> misleading test description
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: DA-APPROVE-4 test description says 'other tags kept after approval' and its fixture includes priority:high and sprint:current, but the new assertions only check that design:approved was tagged and design:awaiting_import was untagged. No assertion verifies that non-design tags are preserved. Given the ticket tag/untag model these operations are atomic and don't affect other tags, so this may be intentional, but the test name and fixture setup create a misleading expectation. Consider adding a comment explaining why preservation is implicit in the tag/untag model.
File: tests/scripts/test-design-approve.sh
Category: verification
